mapper.update: update synlte.objectfield set INDEXTYPE = #{indexType}, ISINDEX = #{isIndex}, NEEDVALUE = #{needValue}, ISCONTORL = #{isContorl}, MEMO = #{memo}, TABLEINDEX = #{tableIndex}, ISQUERY = #{isQuery}, COLUMNNAME_STATE = #{columnNameState}, VERSION = #{version}, ISPRIVATE = #{isPrivate}, PARTITION_RECNO = #{partitionRecno}, ORA_SHOW = #{oraShow}, ODPS_PATTITION = #{odpsPattition}, PRO_TYPE = #{proType}, FIELDID = #{fieldId}, FIELDCHINEENAME = #{fieldChineseName}, FIELDTYPE = #{fieldType}, FIELDLEN = #{fieldLen}, DEFAULTVALUE = #{defaultValue}, FIELDDESCRIBE = #{fieldDescribe}, FIELDNAME = #{fieldName}, FIELDSOURCETYPE = #{fieldSourceType}, recno = #{recno}, STANDARD_RECNO = #{recno}, CLUST_RECNO = #{clustRecno}, PK_RECNO = #{pkRecno}, MD5_INDEX = #{md5Index}, DETERMINERID = #{determinerId}, ZDMGDFLDM = #{zdmgdfldm}, GADSJ_FIELDID = #{gadsjFieldId}, DELETED = 0, ZDFL = #{fieldClassId}, SJLYGCFL = #{sjlygcfl}, RECONCILIATIONTYPE = #{reconciliationType} where OBJECTID = #{objectId} and COLUMNNAME = #{columnName}
